variants.text:
theorem alchemy_tree_t0_condition_strengthened {a b : ℕ} (hrel : IsRelPrime a b) :
    Disjoint (a.divisors.filter IsPrimePow) (b.divisors.filter IsPrimePow) := by
  apply alchemy_tree_t0
  all_goals first
    | assumption
    | exact (Nat.coprime_iff_isRelPrime).2 hrel

goal_delta.new_goal: forall {n : Nat}, n ∈ a.divisors.filter IsPrimePow -> n ∈ b.divisors.filter IsPrimePow -> False

variants.text:
theorem alchemy_tree_t0_goal_weakened {a b : ℕ} (hab : a.Coprime b) :
    forall {n : Nat}, n ∈ a.divisors.filter IsPrimePow -> n ∈ b.divisors.filter IsPrimePow -> False := by
  apply Finset.disjoint_left.mp
  apply alchemy_tree_t0
  all_goals assumption

goal_delta.new_goal: forall {n : Nat}, n ∈ a.divisors.filter IsPrimePow -> n ∈ b.divisors.filter IsPrimePow -> False

variants.text:
theorem alchemy_tree_t0_condition_strengthened_goal_weakened {a b : ℕ} (hrel : IsRelPrime a b) :
    forall {n : Nat}, n ∈ a.divisors.filter IsPrimePow -> n ∈ b.divisors.filter IsPrimePow -> False := by
  apply Finset.disjoint_left.mp
  apply alchemy_tree_t0
  all_goals first
    | assumption
    | exact (Nat.coprime_iff_isRelPrime).2 hrel
